api_key.description: Twitter (X) API v2 App-only Bearer token. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Twitter API base URL override for tests or proxies.

query.description: Recent-search query string (Twitter v2 search syntax), e.g. "from:example".

start_date.description: Optional RFC3339 lower bound sent as start_time; only tweets created at or after this time are returned.

end_date.description: Optional RFC3339 upper bound sent as end_time; only tweets created at or before this time are returned.

page_size.description: Records per page (10-100, Twitter's max_results bounds).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
